info.title: TaskVerify API
info.description: TaskVerify backend API — AI-powered gig task verification with Squad escrow. AI Layer (gemini-3-flash-preview): POST /api/v1/tasks runs deterministic matching then Gemini ranks candidates; POST /api/v1/tasks/:id/submit-proof runs deterministic checks then Gemini evaluates proof against deliverable_spec. All AI decisions fall back to deterministic automatically. Every decision is audit-logged to decision_synthesis_logs. Task status flow: posted → assigned → verified OR flagged_for_dispute → completed (auto 24h) OR complaint_filed OR disputed.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task lifecycle — post, assign, verify (authenticated, role-aware visibility)

tags.name: Worker Profile
tags.description: Authenticated worker self-service — KYC, credit score, loans, insurance (Bearer token required)

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only management endpoints (Bearer token + admin role required)

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: System notifications and broadcasts (Bearer token required)

tags.name: Mock Squad
tags.description: Local mock of Squad payment API (non-production only)

message.example: You have been shortlisted for task: Office Cleaning.

description.example: Deep clean and sanitize the office space.

required_skills.description: Array of required skill tags for this task

notes.example: Upload before photos of the workspace to compare with after completion.

ai_recommendations.description: Persisted AI-ranked worker recommendations (top 5 matches). Auto-generated at task creation. Sorted by match_score (highest first). Each match includes skill fit, location distance, and risk analysis.

WorkerMatch.description: AI-ranked worker match candidate. Included in task.ai_recommendations array (top 5 matches per task).

recommendation_reason.example: Fallback to deterministic engine scores (AI synthesis unavailable).

example: AI synthesis unavailable — manual review recommended.

distance_km.description: Distance to task location in km

details.example: Proof clearly satisfies the deliverable specification.

flags.description: Specific concerns or missing items flagged by the AI. Empty if all good.

description.example: Deep clean and sanitize the office space.

required_skills.description: Array of required skill tags for this task

deliverable_spec.description: JSON string describing the deliverable spec and any reference image URLs.

deliverable_images.description: Optional reference images for the deliverable specification.

description.example: Deep clean and sanitize the office space.

required_skills.description: Array of required skill tags. Can also be string (comma-separated) which will be parsed.

example.notes: Upload before photos of the workspace.

deliverable_spec.description: Object with deliverable requirements (or JSON string in form-data)

description.example: Deep clean, sanitize, and polish the office space.

required_skills.description: Can be array or comma-separated string in client payload.

message.example: I can do this job perfectly.

schema.description: No body required. Files a complaint within the 24-hour verified window.

message.example: Worker did not complete the job properly.

schema.description: Optional dispute reason message (stored for audit, not persisted to DB yet).

get.summary: List tasks related to authenticated user (with AI recommendations)
get.description: Returns tasks visible to the authenticated user based on role and relationship. Role-aware visibility: buyers see only tasks they created, workers see tasks they are assigned/selected/shortlisted/applied to, admins see all. Each task includes persisted ai_recommendations array.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (posted, assigned, verified, etc.)

post.summary: Create a task and auto-generate AI worker recommendations
post.description: Buyer/Admin creates a task. The API runs AI synthesis to rank top workers and persists results to task.ai_recommendations.

201.description: Task created successfully with AI worker matches persisted on task.ai_recommendations

400.description: Missing required fields or invalid deliverable_spec JSON

get.summary: Get a task by ID with AI recommendations (if related to user)
get.description: Returns full task details including persisted ai_recommendations array. Access is role-aware: buyers see only their own tasks, workers see only assigned/selected/shortlisted/applied tasks, admins see all. Unauthorized users receive 404 (not-found).

404.description: Task not found (or not visible to current user)

patch.description: Allows buyer (owner) or admin to update a task while still editable (posted/shortlisted/applications_open/selection_in_progress).

400.description: Invalid payload or task not editable in current status

delete.description: Allows buyer (owner) or admin to delete a task while still editable (posted/shortlisted/applications_open/selection_in_progress).

400.description: Task not deletable at current status

post.summary: Refresh AI-recommended workers for a task
post.description: Triggers AI synthesis to recompute worker matches for the task and persists them to task.ai_recommendations. Useful for buyer UI button action.

post.summary: Buyer shortlists workers from AI recommendations

400.description: Worker IDs array is required

post.summary: Worker applies for a shortlisted task

400.description: Worker ID and proposed price are required

403.description: Worker is not shortlisted or not authorized

post.summary: Buyer confirms a worker from applications

400.description: Another worker has already been confirmed by the buyer

post.summary: Worker accepts assignment and generates Escrow

200.description: Task fully assigned and escrow created

400.description: Buyer has not confirmed this worker yet or task already assigned

403.description: Worker is not the selected worker for this task

post.summary: Optional Advanced AI to recommend best applicant

400.description: No applications found

post.summary: Assign a worker to a task (creates Squad escrow)

200.description: Worker assigned, Squad escrow VA created

400.description: Worker ID is required or invalid

post.summary: Submit task completion proof (triggers AI verification)
post.description: Worker submits proof files and optional text. Deterministic checks verify file presence and GPS proximity, then AI Decision Synthesizer evaluates against deliverable_spec. If verified, a 24-hour complaint window opens before auto-payment release.

200.description: Proof recorded and AI verification result returned

400.description: Missing proof_submission field or invalid input

post.summary: File a complaint on a verified task
post.description: Legacy public complaint endpoint for tasks that are in the verified state and still inside the 24-hour dispute window.

400.description: Task must be verified or complaint window expired

post.summary: File a manual dispute for an AI-flagged task
post.description: Legacy public dispute endpoint for tasks that were flagged_for_dispute by the AI. The request body may include a message for audit context.

400.description: Task must be flagged_for_dispute

parameters.name: skill
parameters.description: Filter by skill (exact match in array)

post.summary: Receive Squad payment events
post.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature required. Signature is computed over the raw JSON body using SQUAD_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

parameters.name: x-squad-signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of raw request body

400.description: Missing signature or body

post.summary: Receive external verification results
post.description: Accepts an external verification decision and updates the task status to `verified`. Intended for external AI pipeline callbacks.

400.description: Missing task_id or verification_result

post.summary: Create a mock virtual account (escrow)
post.description: Non-production only. Generates a fake 10-digit NUBAN and auto-fires a `virtual_account.funded` webhook after 5 seconds.

post.summary: Simulate releasing funds to a worker
post.description: Non-production only. Transfers the held amount from a mock virtual account to a worker.

post.summary: Simulate refunding funds to client
post.description: Non-production only. Refunds the held amount back to the client from a mock virtual account.

post.summary: Request fund release if AI flagged work unfairly
post.description: Worker can request that an admin review their work and release funds if they believe the AI rejected them unfairly.

reason.example: The AI incorrectly rejected my work. All deliverables were met.

200.description: Fund release request submitted for admin review. Task status set to pending_release_of_funds.

400.description: Missing reason or invalid task state

404.description: Task not found or not assigned to you

Admin force-releases funds to worker
Admin force-refunds buyer

get.summary: Dispute detail with proof + AI result

patch.summary: Approve or reject worker fund release request (when they feel AI was unfair)
patch.description: Admin reviews a worker's request to release funds and decides whether to approve (mark complete + transfer funds) or reject (revert to verification state).

reason.example: Worker's submission clearly meets deliverable requirements

200.description: Decision processed. On approve: funds transferred from buyer to worker. On reject: task reverted to AI verification state.

400.description: Invalid decision or wallet transfer failed

get.summary: List all worker fund release requests pending admin review
get.description: Returns all tasks in pending_release_of_funds state with worker info and request reasons.

Approve or reject KYC. Approval upgrades worker tier to verified.

404.description: Not found or not in approved state
